title: Sprint-K H9: Dark-Token-Contrast-Audit — fix 4× AA-violations per Sprint-E Playwright audit
description:
Agent-Role-Declaration: Operator (pieter_pan) -> Forge (sre-expert)

Handoff: Analyse → Umsetzung

Scope: Fix 4 WCAG AA contrast-ratio violations found by Sprint-E Playwright-Mobile-Audit. Known offenders: /monitoring (ratio 1.10, must be ≥ 4.5:1 for normal text), /alerts (ratio 2.57). 2 further violations counted but not yet pin-pointed — re-run audit to locate. Fix by token-delta in globals.css @theme, not per-component overrides.

Done: H1, H4, H6, H7, H11, H12, H13 shipped. H10 deliverables live (cron-catalog-2026-04-20.md + cron-health-audit.sh). MC runs on commit 6cddfc7 (Pixel v2 + postcss-fix + Codex lifecycle-guard). Live health: board=ok, execution=ok, dispatch=ok, costs=degraded (1 legacy anomaly, unrelated).

Open:
- (1) re-run Playwright mobile-audit (post Pixel v2) to confirm current violations
- (2) Systematic token-audit against globals.css @theme tokens (--text, --text-soft, --text-dim, --panel, --panel-2, --border, --border-strong)
- (3) Propose minimum-delta token-deltas bringing failing pairs to AA
- (4) Apply deltas to src/app/globals.css
- (5) Re-run Playwright → 0 violations
- (6) Commit + deploy

State-Snapshot:
- HEAD: 6cddfc7 feat(taskboard): ship mobile-first taskboard v2 shell
- BUILD_ID matches HEAD (rebuild 15:32 CEST)
- mission-control.service active, NRestarts=0
- CSS bundle: 177 KB / 647 utilities (tailwind v4 via postcss.config.mjs restored today)
- Pixel v2 screenshots in tmp-taskboard-v2/ as visual-regression baseline
- Board: 136 canceled / 180 done / 14 legacy-failed / 0 draft

Entschieden:
- Token-level fix preferred over per-component overrides — centralize in globals.css @theme
- Dark-theme only (no light-theme shipped, no light-theme work)
- Brand-accent #7c3aed violet is sacrosanct — any token-change MUST NOT affect it
- R49 strict: every contrast-ratio cited from Playwright-output, no estimation
- Use Pixel v2 screenshots as visual-regression baseline (no visual drift allowed)

Offen-Entschieden:
- Which 2 of the 4 violations are currently un-located: TBD during audit step (1)
- Exact token-delta amounts: TBD after audit step (2) — Forge proposes, operator reviews in chat before step (4) applies
- Whether to add a CI-gate for future contrast-regression: out-of-scope for this task (propose as follow-up only if clearly valuable)

Anti-Scope:
- NO light-theme work
- NO focus-ring changes (separate a11y-item)
- NO target-size / tap-area changes (separate a11y-item)
- NO changes to violet brand-accent #7c3aed
- NO global-design-system refactor — minimum-delta only
- NO expansion of Playwright test surface beyond contrast rules on the 4 named routes

Bootstrap-Hint:
- Start: `cd /home/piet/.openclaw/workspace/mission-control && npx playwright test e2e/contrast-audit.spec.ts --reporter=json > /tmp/h9-audit-before.json 2>&1`
- If the spec does not exist, create a minimal one that loads /, /taskboard, /monitoring, /alerts in iPhone-14 viewport and runs axe-core contrast rules only
- Parse audit JSON → extract fg/bg pairs per violation → map to globals.css tokens
- Propose token-deltas in chat before step (4) — operator approves
- After fix: `... > /tmp/h9-audit-after.json` must show 0 AA-failures
- Single atomic commit with conventional-commit msg
- Delta-report: `vault/03-Agents/sprint-k-h9-contrast-audit-report-2026-04-20.md`
- Time-box: 2h. If > 4 violations found or systematic token issue surfaces, STOP and escalate with findings — do not blow the budget.

Task ID: sprint-k-h9

Objective: Eliminate 4× WCAG-AA contrast violations in dark-theme Mission Control UI so /api/health-adjacent UX surfaces pass axe-core contrast-rules without regressing the violet #7c3aed brand-accent.

Definition of Done:
- `npx playwright test e2e/contrast-audit.spec.ts` returns 0 AA-failures across /, /taskboard, /monitoring, /alerts on iPhone-14 viewport
- Token-deltas committed to src/app/globals.css only (no per-component overrides)
- Before/after audit JSON artifacts written to /tmp/h9-audit-{before,after}.json
- Delta-report committed to vault/03-Agents/sprint-k-h9-contrast-audit-report-2026-04-20.md with quoted ratios + token-diffs
- Single atomic commit on master with msg `fix(a11y): resolve 4× AA contrast violations (Sprint-K H9)`
- /api/health overall=degraded-or-better (no regression)

Return format:
- resultSummary (≤ 500 chars): violations-before N, violations-after N, deltas-applied list, commit-sha, confirm AA-clean
- artifacts:
  - /tmp/h9-audit-before.json
  - /tmp/h9-audit-after.json (MUST show 0 AA-violations)
  - vault/03-Agents/sprint-k-h9-contrast-audit-report-2026-04-20.md
